Frequently Asked Questions

How do I book a blood test at home?

Open the app, pick a panel, choose a time slot. A nurse visits your home.

What does a basic blood panel cost?

Starts from AED 199.

Are your nurses DHA-licensed?

Yes, all nurses and physicians hold active DHA licenses.

When will I get my results?

Urgent panels: 12 hours. Standard: 24–48 hours. Specialised: 3–5 days.

Which cities do you serve?

Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Riyadh — with expansion planned.

Is the test accurate compared to a lab visit?

Yes — same accredited labs, same equipment, same standards.
